meaning: adj.和谐的,讨人喜欢的,令人亲近的
examples: I find our new neighbor simpatico in every respect.
Well, for one thing, Timberlake's dorky character croons a self-penned love song called "Simpatico" that's easily the worst tune since Rebecca Black's "Friday."
Bulgaria has similarly resisted extremist pressures to foment trouble with its simpatico Slavic brothers in Macedonia.
The two are so simpatico, if that term is still permitted, they would probably still be talking.
In theory, at least, that would make most everyone more simpatico with Republican economics and the priorities.
